title: Local schoolgirls chosen to play at SA Rugby's National Youth Week
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Three schoolgirl rugby...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Three schoolgirl rugby players from the Mossel Bay area are included in South Western District (SWD) Rugby squads to play at SA Rugby’s National Youth Week from 30 June to 4 July.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Three schoolgirl rugby players from the Mossel Bay area are included in South Western District (SWD) Rugby squads to play at SA Rugby’s National Youth Week from 30 June to 4 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There is an U18 squad and an U16 squad and 23 players in each squad.","html":"There is an U18 squad and an U16 squad and 23 players in each squad."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The girls from the Mossel Bay area chosen for the SWD U18 squad are Linothando Hlekiso of Hillcrest Secondary School in Mossel Bay and Akeelah Mei of Great Brak River Secondary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A girl from Point High School in Mossel Bay, Elizka le Grange, was selected for the SWD Rugby U16 squad.","html":"A girl from Point High School in Mossel Bay, Elizka le Grange, was selected for the SWD Rugby U16 squad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"National Youth Week takes place at Jeppe High School, Johannesburg.","html":"National Youth Week takes place at Jeppe High School, Johannesburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Akeelah Mei of Great Brak River Secondary School.","html":"Akeelah Mei of Great Brak River Secondary School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD Rugby community coach, Stanley Kama, based in Mossel Bay, with Linothando Hlekiso of Hillcrest Secondary School. Kama is one of the SWD coaches of the schoolgirl rugby players.","html":"SWD Rugby community coach, Stanley Kama, based in Mossel Bay, with Linothando Hlekiso of Hillcrest Secondary School. Kama is one of the SWD coaches of the schoolgirl rugby players."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elizka le Grange from Point High School.","html":"Elizka le Grange from Point High School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
